name: io.github.anhnguyen0905/codex-mcp
description: Bridge Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI: execute plans, resume sessions, read-only reviews, live progress, git diff results.

environmentVariables.name: CODEX_MCP_TERMINAL
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to open a live-progress terminal window by default

environmentVariables.name: CODEX_BIN
environmentVariables.description: Override path to the Codex CLI binary
